title: acrostichum scandens
intro: Acrostichum scandens is a type of fern, specifically a climbing or scrambling epiphytic fern native to tropical regions of the world. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Acrostichum scandens include its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can help to speed up the healing process of wounds and prevent infections. The plant's leaves are often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from fever to digestive issues.
